name: American Style Flapjacks/Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Add the egg and mix until it is almost absorbed.
3. Gradually add the milk, mixing until semi-smooth.
4. Mix in the melted butter (or margarine).
5. This batter will make about 5 pancakes, each approximately 7 inches in diameter.
6. Adjust the amount of sugar according to your preference for syrup usage.
